submission.implementation_notes: HTLC monadic validator in do-notation on the zero-cost early-termination Validator monad (Plinth.Validator) with the typed decoding DSL (Plinth.Decoder.Named), on the frozen plinth-1.45 branch: QualifiedDo sequences decode-or-abort stages (V.do) and Named walk regions (N.do); each ScriptContext/datum/TxInfo field is decoded with a single Constr walk, and a value that is only compared is never structurally decoded (Plinth.Encoded). Re-optimised for CAPE metrics schema 2.0.0, whose aggregates cover only the happy-path (accept) measurements: per-path fields-regions over HTLCDatum (claim reads recipient/secretHash/timeout, refund reads payer/timeout) replace the lazy asData selectors. inline-unconditional-growth is a no-op on the 1.45 plugin (default/24/32/52/200 build byte-identically), so the pragma is removed and the whole gain is structural. total_fee 48023 to 44476 lovelace (-7.4%); every axis improved (cpu_max -12.7%, mem_max -15.0%, script size 1254 to 1242 bytes). Source: lib/HTLC/Monadic.hs (+ lib/Plinth/Validator.hs, lib/Plinth/Decoder/Named.hs, lib/Plinth/Decoder/Named/ScriptContext.hs, lib/Plinth/Encoded.hs) in plinth-cape-submissions @ 49c94429c49b7c9e7d038e5685ba85e07b9d332b (branch plinth-1.45).
